tagline: Catalog Explorer will soon receive navigation improvements to streamline workflows and help you discover and manage data assets more efficiently.
what_it_does: Catalog Explorer will soon receive navigation improvements to streamline workflows and help you discover and manage data assets more efficiently. Simplified navigation: The duplicative Catalogs tab is removed to reduce redundancy and focus on a single catalog navigation surface. DBFS and Send feedback actions move into the kebab menu for a cleaner layout.
why_it_matters: Catalog Explorer will soon receive navigation improvements to streamline workflows and help you discover and manage data assets more efficiently.
key_takeaway: Catalog Explorer will soon receive navigation improvements to streamline workflows and help you discover and manage data assets more efficiently.
